blocked_categories.policy: Do not store or reuse source title, author, character names, family names, faction names, geography, technique names, or artifact names.
Do not reuse the exact chain of electronic accident, body takeover, noble heir, sibling murder, cliff/wildland landing, and first high-level creature asset.
Reusable: cross-system rule arbitrage. Not reusable: named cultivation method, named symbol script, named artifact, and exact ability sequence.
Do not promote objectification, coerced relationship rewards, or humiliation framed as sexualized comedy.

replacement_policy: Change source-world profession, arrival mechanism, host identity debt, first asset type, and first social map.
Keep the abstract state variables, not the event chain.
Each generated project must add a different cost model for cross-system arbitrage.
Replace outdated relationship rewards with agency, bargain, alliance, rivalry, or ethical conflict.
